heading: Naval shipyards
label: 8163 Naval shipyards
text: Commanders of naval shipyards may be selected by the President from officers of the Navy not below the grade of commander.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5943.34 U.S.C. 501R.S. 1542.The words “Commanders of naval shipyards” are substituted for the words “commandants of the several navy yards” to conform to present terminology. The words “of the Navy” are inserted for clarity.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 5943 of this title
